description: Kotlin Multiplatform para Termux no Android ARM64. Inclui o compilador Kotlin via pkg, kotlin-language-server (LSP) e suporte a projetos KMP compartilhando código entre plataformas.

install_steps.description: Instalando o compilador Kotlin via pkg

install_steps.command: pkg install -y zip unzip curl 2>&1 || true

KLS_VERSION=$(curl -s https://api.github.com/repos/fwcd/kotlin-language-server/releases/latest | grep '"tag_name"' | sed 's/.*"tag_name": "//;s/".*//' 2>/dev/null) && echo "Versão mais recente: $KLS_VERSION" && mkdir -p $PREFIX/opt/kotlin-language-server && curl -L "https://github.com/fwcd/kotlin-language-server/releases/download/$KLS_VERSION/server.zip" -o $TMPDIR/kls.zip 2>&1 && unzip -o $TMPDIR/kls.zip -d $PREFIX/opt/kotlin-language-server 2>&1 && rm $TMPDIR/kls.zip && echo 'OK: kotlin-language-server instalado'

config_steps.command: test -f $PREFIX/bin/kotlin-language-server && echo 'kotlin-language-server OK' || echo 'AVISO: kotlin-language-server não encontrado'
